summary: A symmetrical rectangular bunker or fortified structure with a stepped brick roof, concrete foundation platform, and a lower level featuring stone brick walls with four evenly-spaced window openings. The building sits on a raised concrete base surrounded by dirt and grass.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramidal brick roof

rebuild_hints: Create a rectangular concrete foundation platform approximately 12×10 blocks
Build lower walls from stone brick with gray stone corner reinforcements
Install four evenly-spaced window openings (2 blocks wide, 1 block tall) on front and back faces
Add concrete trim band horizontally between lower and upper sections
Construct upper section from brick in a stepped pyramid pattern, recessing each layer inward
Ensure bilateral symmetry along both horizontal axes
Top the structure with a final brick layer forming the apex
Surround foundation with concrete border platform
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and floor configuration not visible
Precise window frame material (may include wood or other trim)
Whether the structure is hollow or partially filled
Exact height of each stepped roof layer
Possible decorative or functional purpose of the stepped roof design
